title: ferray-strings: regex_ops compiles regex per call — no plan/cache for repeated patterns
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

match_() and extract() in regex_ops.rs presumably compile the regex pattern on each call. For repeated regex operations with the same pattern on different arrays, pre-compiling and caching the regex would improve performance. NumPy doesn't have built-in regex (it defers to Python's re module), so this is a ferray-specific optimization opportunity. The regex crate already supports pre-compiled patterns — just expose a way to pass a pre-compiled &Regex.
